subcodes.first_line: O servant of the divine Threshold! On this memorable Day when resplendent rays from the horizon of being have illumined the realm of creation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عبد درگاه الهی در این یوم مشهود که انوار ساطعه از افق وجود امکانرا روشن
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God
